options.name: levels_cleared_to_goal
options.description: How many levels you need to clear to goal

options.name: number_of_levels
options.description:
The maximum number of levels included in generation
Must be greater than or equal to levels cleared to goal

options.name: level_likeliness
options.description:
Controls which levels can appear in the multiworld
0 means that level will not appear
Any other positive number is treated as a weight for how likely it is for that level to appear

options.name: starting_level
options.description: The level you will start with

options.name: game_difficulty
options.description:
The difficulty you want to play at. This can be changed in the games options menu.

Monk: Money doesn't exist
Gardener: Start with 1500 money, buildings cost 50% normal price
Ecologist: Start with 1000 money, buildings cost normal price
Environmental Engineer: Start with 1000 money, buildings cost 125% normal price

options.name: progression_balancing
options.description:
A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

A lower setting means more getting stuck. A higher setting means less getting stuck.

options.name: accessibility
options.description:
Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

**Full:** ensure everything can be reached and acquired.

**Minimal:** ensure what is needed to reach your goal can be acquired.

options.name: rain_logic
options.description: Allows logic to require using rain for water instead of water pumps

options.name: local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be in their native world.

options.name: non_local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be outside their native world.

options.name: start_inventory
options.description: Start with the specified amount of these items. Example: "Bomb: 1"

options.name: start_hints
options.description: Start with these item's locations prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.

options.name: start_location_hints
options.description: Start with these locations and their item prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.

options.description: Prevent these locations from having an important item.
